title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zomato - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
